name: Frozen Chocolate Banana Pops
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut peeled bananas into halves crosswise.
2. Impale each half on a wooden skewer and place in the freezer for 1 hour or until frozen (coatings will run off if fruit is at room temperature).
3. Melt chocolate in the top of a double boiler over hot, not boiling, water.
4. Add oil to the melted chocolate and stir until smooth. Keep warm over hot water while dipping.
5. Remove bananas from the freezer a few at a time.
6. Dip each banana into the melted chocolate, making sure all surfaces are completely covered.
7. Gently shake or twirl the banana before removing it from the pan to remove excess coating.
8. While the chocolate is still soft, roll the coated banana in colored sprinkles, coconut, or nuts.
9. If the coating becomes too hard to hold decorations, apply a little warm coating to pop them off.
10. When covering sets, place pops on squares of foil, wrap securely and store in the freezer until ready to eat.
